data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures encryption of data in transit with SSL/TLS protocols.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Implements MFA to verify user identities and prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Supports multiple MFA methods including OTP and biometric.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against web-based attacks using WAF solutions.
data.technical_spec: Integrated WAF with configurable security policies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Implements DLP strategies to safeguard sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Custom policies to prevent data breaches.
